column1: # Hand-maintained status annotations for the generated README.md.
#   green   — implemented and verified by tests whose expectations cite a JS source.
#   orange  — implemented with a known behavioral divergence (note required).
#   wontfix — raising stub kept by design (note required).
#   planned — raising stub with a specific plan (note replaces the default "Planned.").
# entry contradicts the code (e.g. green on a raising stub).
